extortion.description: Widdop & Co. Widdop Data System Program and SQL Databases for Sale!!!Widdop & Co, a family-owned wholesale gifts and home decor supplier, is selling the source code of their Widdop Data System program and relevant SQL databases for April 29, 2024. These databases contain all suppliers and buyers with contact details, the company's financial flows, and algorithms for discounts and margins. By buying these databases and software, you are buying a turnkey ready-made business.    More
